title: July 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 3''' is the 184th day of the year (185th in leap years), with 181 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Anne Gerety]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Yeardley Smith]] is born.
*[[2001]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' paperback published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 43|''Star Wars'' (1998) 43]] published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars: Republic: The Hunt for Aurra Sing (TPB)|''Star Wars Republic: The Hunt for Aurra Sing'']] trade paperback published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 27]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 2: New Galactic Order]]'' webcomic begins publishing online.
*2009 – ''[[Timeline 3: The Return of the Mandalorians]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Forces of Destiny]]'' premieres with "[[Sands of Jakku]]" on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Rebel Files]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Maker Lab]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Are You Scared, Darth Vader?]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Target Vader 1|''Target Vader'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 23|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 23]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance - Finn 1|''Age of Resistance - Finn'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Inquisitors 1|''Inquisitors'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 9|''The High Republic'' (2023) 9]] published.
